generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our allies from reckless foreign interference. When we rely too much on others for our security, we're putting our partners at risk too. Let's stand strong together and ensure no one can exploit our dependencies. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
